name: squad-rally
description: CLI tool that dispatches Squad teams to GitHub issues and PR reviews via git worktrees

scripts.test:e2e:fast: GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 RALLY_E2E_FILE_EXCLUDE='^dispatch/' node test/build-jsx.mjs && GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 RALLY_E2E_FILE_EXCLUDE='^dispatch/' node --test --test-force-exit --test-timeout 120000 test/e2e/runner.js ./test/e2e/runner.test.js
scripts.test:e2e:dispatch: GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 RALLY_E2E_FILE_PATTERN='^dispatch/' node test/build-jsx.mjs && GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 RALLY_E2E_FILE_PATTERN='^dispatch/' node --test --test-force-exit --test-timeout 900000 test/e2e/runner.js
